meta.commit_message: Use tresca/von mises methods in TF \`stresscl\(\)\` \(#4433\) CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Change tresca stress calculation to be numba compliant for pytest CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Update von mises function to use numba CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking :fire: Remove \`sigvm\` method from TF base class and use the calculate_von_mises_stress function from materials file instead CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Add tests for Tresca stress calculation with various input types CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Add tests for von Mises stress calculation with various input types
